piece.title: Aural Anthem
piece.notes: 20-minute four-movement ambient/cinematic work in B aeolian. Inspired by Faltermeyer's Top Gun Anthem bed. FormaComposition generates pad + anthem melody tracks. Juno-6V arpeggiator runs externally in Logic, synced at 116 BPM, 8th notes, receiving MIDI from harmony track. Guitar layered live at M2 peak and M4 climax. Four movements: Approach (5 min), Engagement (5 min), Descent (4 min), Return (6 min).

sections.name: m1_bed
sections.notes: MOVEMENT 1: APPROACH. Pure bed — pad and bass only. No anthem melody yet. The arpeggio (Juno-6V external) establishes the pulse. Motif transform: inversion — the motif shape descends, questioning. Fade in from silence.

sections.name: m1_anthem
sections.notes: Anthem melody enters — lyrical, simple, first statement of motif in inversion. Melody is the question. Bass moves to root_fifth for gentle forward motion. Arc breathes across the section.

sections.name: m2_build
sections.notes: MOVEMENT 2: ENGAGEMENT. Harmonic departure to D major (bIII) — brighter, more open, tension with B aeolian tonal center. Motif transform: augmentation — same shape, twice as slow, more weight. Density builds. Bass walks for forward motion.

sections.name: m2_peak
sections.notes: Full density peak. Anthem motif augmented — long, sustained, heroic. GUITAR ENTERS HERE. Walking bass drives forward. This is the emotional apex of the piece. Counterpoint added below melody for extra harmonic weight.

sections.name: m3_dissolve
sections.notes: MOVEMENT 3: DESCENT. Harmonic shift to E minor (iv relative). Motif transform: retrograde — the anthem played backwards, fragmenting. Density drops sharply. Guitar gone. Melody becomes generative, wandering rather than stating. The bed unravels.

sections.name: m3_void
sections.notes: Stripped back to near silence. Sparse, pedal bass, generative melody fragments. The arpeggio (external) slows or stops at your discretion in Logic — automate Juno-6V arpeggiator rate here. The harmonic valley before the return.

sections.name: m4_return
sections.notes: MOVEMENT 4: RETURN. Back to B aeolian but wider harmonic sweep — i-VI-III-VII gives more space than the original i-VII-VI-VII. Motif transform: expand — intervals widened, more heroic than the original. Anthem voice returns lyrical. The arpeggio resumes. Fade in from the void.

sections.name: m4_climax
sections.notes: Final climax. Full density, develop behavior, expanded motif at full expression. GUITAR RETURNS — sustained, sparse, high register. Walking bass. Counterpoint below. The piece resolves what Movement 2 declared.

sections.name: m4_fade
sections.notes: Dissolution back to the bed. Sparse, pedal, generative — mirrors the opening but now the motif has been heard in all its transforms. The piece ends as it began, but earned. Fade to silence.
